key_insight: PepsiCo deployed two production optimization systems—PromoAI and PricingAI—that combine machine learning with mathematical programming to automate large-scale promotion and pricing decisions.
engineering_relevance: The paper shows how data-driven optimization can scale to enterprise revenue management by turning complex market, channel, and portfolio constraints into actionable price and promotion recommendations.
method: PromoAI: ML-based promotion forecasts + mixed-integer linear programming to optimize promo calendars
PricingAI: Bayesian hierarchical elasticity models + nonlinear programming for multi-period base-price optimization
Both systems incorporate business constraints, competitor effects, and revenue/margin targets
evidence_signal: The abstract reports that PromoAI searches millions of product-promotion-timing combinations and that both systems were developed and deployed at PepsiCo at scale.
watch_item: Real-world performance depends on forecast quality, elasticity estimation stability, and careful constraint tuning to avoid recommendations that are infeasible or misaligned with market reactions.
paper_title: PepsiCo Deploys AI-Driven Pricing and Promotion Optimization at Scale
